sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-sy-populated-place-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: GeoNames populated-place rows used to find candidate localities in empty Quneitra subdistrict polygons.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/geoboundaries-syr-adm3.geojson
rawFiles.notes: geoBoundaries ADM3 polygons used for point-in-polygon parent assignment.

transforms: Selected GeoNames populated-place records whose coordinates fall inside the Al-Butayhah or Masaada geoBoundaries ADM3 polygons.
Created locality records for two subdistricts that had no HDX/OCHA populated-place children.
Used GeoNames asciiName as canonical English name and kept diacritic GeoNames names as English alternate-spelling aliases when useful.
Added Arabic names only when GeoNames alternate names provided Arabic text.
Mapped GeoNames PPLA3 to town and other included populated-place feature codes to locality.
Skipped the duplicate Majdal Shams GeoNames row that had no alternate-name detail.
reviewNotes: Added 12 GeoNames-seeded locality records: 3 under Al-Butayhah and 9 under Masaada. Parent assignment is based on point-in-polygon checks against the current geoBoundaries ADM3 shapes. The HDX/OCHA populated-places source still has no child locality records for these two subdistricts.
